SpreadSlayer Terms & Conditions

Last updated: 2026-01-01

1. USE OF SERVICE
This platform is provided for informational and entertainment purposes only. All sports analytics, model outputs, and DFS optimizations are for reference only and do not constitute financial or gambling advice.

2. ACCOUNTS
You must be invited by an administrator to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials.

3. PROHIBITED USE
You may not share your account credentials, attempt to reverse-engineer the platform, or use the service for any unlawful purpose.

4. NO LIABILITY
SpreadSlayer and its operators are not liable for any losses arising from the use of information provided on this platform.

5. CHANGES
These terms may be updated at any time. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

By creating an account, you confirm you have read and agree to these terms.
